name: Chicken'n' Vegetable Stir Fry2
recipeIngredient: 1/2 each Medium Red or Green Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into thin strips.
2. Cut sweet peppers into thin strips.
3. In a large skillet, heat oil and cook chicken with vegetables over medium-high heat, stirring constantly. Cook for 10 minutes or until chicken is golden and vegetables are crisp-tender.
4. Thoroughly blend the Golden Onion Soup Mix, cornstarch, ginger, water, soy sauce, and vinegar in a bowl.
5. Stir the blended mixture into the chicken mixture. Bring to a boil, then simmer uncovered for 2-3 minutes or until the sauce is thickened.
6. Serve over hot rice and garnish with sliced green onion and toasted sesame seeds if desired.
